findings.summary: RF filter bank breakout with Mini-Circuits LFCN low-pass filters. FI-prefix filters misclassified as fuses via F->fuse single-char fallback.

incorrect.description: FI-prefix components (LFCN-6000D+, LFCN-4400+, etc.) classified as 'fuse' via F->fuse single-char fallback despite lib_id 'EMI_FILTER'

suggestions: Add lib_id fallback: 'EMI_FILTER' or 'FILTER' in lib_id should override fuse classification
